subject: A muscular, bearded humanoid fighter in ragged red-cloth wrappings, holding a weapon in one hand and reaching toward a glowing supernatural tree with the other
description: A broad-shouldered, bearded figure stands in a defensive crouch in a dark forest clearing. Their clothing is minimal — torn and bound with red fabric strips. The left hand grips what appears to be a short firearm or crossbow-style weapon with a green electric charge visible on it. The right arm is extended toward a glowing green tree trunk, whose surface is animated and supernatural — a large hand-shaped protrusion of bark or vine is pushing outward from the wood toward the figure's reaching hand. Bright green light from the tree illuminates the figure's face and chest. The forest behind is dark and foreboding.
foreground: Ragged bearded fighter reaching toward a glowing supernatural tree, weapon in other hand
background: Dark forest, glowing animated tree trunk with hand-shaped protrusion
emotion: focused urgency — the figure is reaching out with purpose, body coiled and ready, not fleeing
